nodes.name: 乔尔·阿萨夫·艾伦
nodes.summary: 乔尔·阿萨夫·艾伦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Puna ibis、Yungas manakin、Black-and-white antbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Osbert Salvin
nodes.summary: Osbert Salvin是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍、Black-eared wood quail等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Black-and-white antbird
nodes.summary: Black-and-white antbird（Black-and-white antbird，学名 Myrmochanes hemileucus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-and-white antbird (Myrmochanes hemileucus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-and-white antbird is found in the western Amazon Basin along the Amazon from its origin in Peru to the mouth of the Rio Madeira in Brazil, and also along its major tributaries

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-and-white antbird is found in the western Amazon Basin along the Amazon from its origin in Peru to the mouth of the Rio Madeira in Brazil, and also along its major tributaries

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Human activity has little short-term direct effect on the Black-and-white Antbird, other than the local effects of habitat destruction, [however it] potentially is vulnerable to widespread habitat loss, as might occur through perturbations of the Amazonian hydrological regime stemming from widespread deforestation, dam construction, or global climate change." One study predicts that the species will lose at least 50% of its habitat within Brazil due to infrastructure development.{{ cite journal | last1= Vale | first1=M.M
